context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Visual feedback for successful cleaning action, indicates cleanliness
context.screen_position: Spawns on floor area (y=110-125), random x positions
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player swipes floor to clean. 3 sparkles appear at random floor positions, fade after 0.5 seconds. Indicates successful cleaning.

animation.description: Spawns at random floor positions, appears instantly, fades out over 0.5 seconds. 3 sparkles spawn simultaneously when cleaning.

visual_specification.details: Sparkle: 3x3px white/cream (#FFF1E8) 4-pointed star shape (+ pattern). Spawn area: floor (x=10-118, y=110-125). Movement: static (no movement). Lifespan: 0.5 seconds. Fade: entire duration (gradual fade). 3 sparkles spawn simultaneously at random positions when floor cleaned.

relationships.differences_from: dust_particle: white vs gray, clean vs dirty, static vs drifting. heart_particle: star vs heart, cleaning vs petting.

explicit_negations: Sparkles do not move or drift
Sparkles do not grow or shrink (constant size)
Do not multiply or chain react
